title: PPL Custom Theme for Jade
description: Pixel Perfection Custom Theme for Jade.
body:
![ui sample](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f67e415b941649f253f0ad9feac501d264d0f203.png)

**[Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)** is a mod by [Snownee](https://modrinth.com/user/Snownee), this small pack only changes the Jade **GUI**.
This pack was made for [Pixel Perfection Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy) texture pack, but can be used as a standalone pack as well. This pack was originally part of [PPL Alternative GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-alternative-gui), and is recommended to use it with this one.

# HOW TO INSTALL
Download the correct version for you. Copy the file into the Minecraft installation folder inside "resourcepacks". Enable it by selecting it from the resource packs menu on the game sttings.
It should activate when you do this. However, if it does not, open Jade settings (you can use [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)) and enable it there manually in: Mod Settings/Appearance/Theme.
